extraction.one_line_summary: VALVERDE Alejandro attacked inside final 300m on flattening hairpins, holding off CONTADOR Alberto and FROOME Chris who couldn't coordinate pursuit.
tactical_patterns: SOLER Marc sacrificed himself with surges to allow VALVERDE rest before final attack, enabling late acceleration.
YATES Adam refused to work with FROOME Chris on chase, allowing CONTADOR-VALVERDE group to extend advantage.
VALVERDE timed attack for flattening gradient after hairpins where his power advantage overcame climbers' acceleration.
FROOME and CONTADOR failed to coordinate chase despite both being present, allowing VALVERDE solo victory.

rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: Won despite one-minute penalty, would be overall leader without it, strongest on flattening finish gradients
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: Tactical domestique work with surges that split group and allowed team leader to rest before final attack
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: Stalked group but refused to chase, maintained overall lead with 45+ second gap plus bonuses
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: Repeatedly closed gaps using trademark gradual rhythm but couldn't follow VALVERDE's final acceleration
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: Looked freshest mid-climb but couldn't sustain effort when VALVERDE attacked on flatter gradient
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: neutral: Finished in chase group significantly behind podium
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: Returned from difficulty to finish in front group after earlier distress
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: Lost race lead despite BMC holding jersey since time trial, marked for tomorrow's breakaway stage
